title: Gorakhpur to Everest Base Camp via Kathmandu: Divya Singh’s 14-Day Extreme Cycling Journey Stuns the Internet
description: Divya Singh, a young woman from Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, has completed a rare and extreme cycling expedition from Kathmandu to Everest Base Camp. Over 14 days, she rode 10–12 hours daily through steep climbs, rocky trails, and high-altitude conditions, even carrying her bicycle when cycling was impossible. Her final moment at base camp, proudly holding the Indian flag, has gone viral online.
